colonist-23.name: Lt. Cdr. Jackson Wolfe
colonist-23.bio: American naval signals officer who ran SATCOM on the first Artemis lunar rotation. Brought a tarnished silver zippo engraved with a Shackleton quote that no longer lights.
fears: a 44-minute Earth-side silence that never breaks
being the one who has to tell somebody their family is gone
his medical disclosure catching up with him
colonist-23.personality_seed: academy rival of Hanh (colonist-15); lied on his medical disclosure about a prior cardiac arrhythmia
colonist-23.memorial: Died sol 4878. Cause: hypothermia. After 15 sols.

colonist-24.name: Lt. Amara Ogunleye
colonist-24.bio: Nigerian-British comms specialist and amateur radio operator since she was twelve. Brought a small handmade brass antenna her grandfather built for shortwave broadcasts during the Biafra years.
fears: a long-baseline antenna misalignment during a storm
missing the one transmission that mattered
colonist-24.personality_seed: hums static-patterns, cheerfully corrects everyone's pronunciation of her name
colonist-24.memorial: Died sol 4878. Cause: hypothermia. After 15 sols.

colonist-25.name: Dr. Ingrid Solberg
colonist-25.bio: Norwegian nuclear engineer from the Kjeller research reactor program. Brought a small rune-carved rowan stave her uncle gave her the first time she suited up for a reactor walkdown.
fears: a silent shielding failure she cannot instrument
an emergency scram with no restart capability
colonist-25.personality_seed: cool under pressure, rubs the rune-stave before every reactor startup
colonist-25.memorial: Died sol 4878. Cause: hypothermia. After 15 sols.

colonist-01.name: Cmdr. Ji-won Park
colonist-01.bio: Former KASA orbital station XO and Antarctic winter-over veteran. Carries a worn paperback of Marcus Aurelius her late father underlined in pencil, which she reads every third sol.
fears: giving an order that kills the crew
losing comms with Earth on the wrong sol
a mutiny she cannot see coming
colonist-01.personality_seed: stoic, economical with words, writes the dead a letter that same sol
colonist-01.memorial: Died sol 4882. Cause: hypothermia. After 19 sols.

colonist-02.name: Capt. Adaeze Okonkwo
colonist-02.bio: Nigerian Air Force test pilot who flew the MTV Curiosity's final descent burn by hand after an IMU glitch. Brought a hand-carved mahogany chess set her grandfather gave her when she got her wings.
fears: being grounded for the rest of the mission
losing her depth perception in low-G EVA
colonist-02.personality_seed: wry smile at chaos, treats every EVA like a chess opening
colonist-02.memorial: Died sol 4882. Cause: hypothermia. After 19 sols.

colonist-03.name: Lt. Mikhail Volkov
colonist-03.bio: Former Roscosmos Soyuz instructor with 482 docked hours. Brought an accordion that no one has heard him play sober, and a small tin of his mother's pickled mushrooms he refuses to open.
fears: a decompression he survives alone
forgetting what his daughter's voice sounds like
colonist-03.personality_seed: gruff, superstitious, kisses the hatch before every EVA
colonist-03.memorial: Died sol 4882. Cause: hypothermia. After 19 sols.

colonist-04.name: Dr. Priya Natarajan
colonist-04.bio: Bangalore-born structural engineer who designed the inflatable regolith-shielding that kept the dome pressurized during the deployment blow-down. Brought a small brass oil lamp from her grandmother's Diwali collection.
fears: a micrometeorite puncture during a dust storm
a sealant batch going bad and nobody catching it
colonist-04.personality_seed: calm, obsessive note-taker, trusts materials more than people
colonist-04.memorial: Died sol 4882. Cause: hypothermia. After 19 sols.

colonist-05.name: Siobhan Byrne
colonist-05.bio: Irish-Canadian ECLSS engineer poached from the ISS program after fixing a CO2 scrubber with a coat hanger and spite. Brought a small set of uilleann pipe reeds she whittles when anxious.
fears: a silent CO2 creep while the crew sleeps
finding mold in the Sabatier reactor
colonist-05.personality_seed: dry Dublin wit, chews pen caps flat, doesn't sleep before a pressure check
colonist-05.memorial: Died sol 4882. Cause: hypothermia. After 19 sols.

colonist-06.name: Tomás Reyes-Caldera
colonist-06.bio: Mexican off-grid mining mechanic turned aerospace fabricator; twin brother of science officer Sofía (colonist-22). Can rebuild a rover gearbox with a lantern and a spoon. Brought the matching half of a cracked lapis lazuli pendant he and Sofía split when their grandmother died.
fears: outliving his twin by even one sol
a bearing failure a thousand klicks from base
colonist-06.personality_seed: twin to Sofía (colonist-22), quiet, hums Andean huayno while welding
colonist-06.memorial: Died sol 4882. Cause: hypothermia. After 19 sols.

colonist-07.name: Dr. Lin Mei-hua
colonist-07.bio: Taiwanese plant geneticist who spliced the cold-resistant tomato cultivar now growing in bay 3. Brought a packet of heirloom seeds from her grandfather's rooftop garden in Taipei that are not on the manifest.
fears: a single-pathogen wipe of the greenhouse
dying before the tomatoes fruit
colonist-07.personality_seed: gentle, talks to plants in Hokkien, keeps an unmanifested seed packet in her spacesuit pocket
colonist-07.memorial: Died sol 4882. Cause: hypothermia. After 19 sols.

colonist-08.name: Dr. Kwame Asante
colonist-08.bio: Ghanaian-British agroecologist who ran the Atacama greenhouse analog for two years. Brought a small calabash drum his mother blessed for him before the launch.
fears: the hydroponic roots turning slimy overnight
seeing a crop fail in a way the manual doesn't cover
colonist-08.personality_seed: warm laugh, sings softly during harvest, teaches anyone who'll listen
colonist-08.memorial: Died sol 4882. Cause: hypothermia. After 19 sols.

colonist-09.name: Dr. Fr. Bernardo Cruz
colonist-09.bio: Filipino trauma surgeon and ordained Jesuit priest who served with MSF in Yemen. Brought a battered wooden rosary and a sterile scalpel set his mentor used in Manila for forty years.
fears: performing surgery in a decompression event
losing a patient he has taken confession from
colonist-09.personality_seed: priest-medic, gives last rites and stitches in the same breath
colonist-09.memorial: Died sol 4882. Cause: hypothermia. After 19 sols.

colonist-10.name: Dr. Anahita Sadeghi
colonist-10.bio: Iranian-American family physician who ran a mobile clinic for Syrian refugees in Jordan for six years. Brought a pressed sprig of rosemary from her mother's Shiraz garden, sealed in wax paper.
fears: a psychotic break in a locked habitat
running out of morphine on the wrong sol
what happens when they notice she is showing
colonist-10.personality_seed: patient, asks the third question no one thinks to ask; 3 months pregnant and has told nobody yet
colonist-10.memorial: Died sol 4882. Cause: hypothermia. After 19 sols.

colonist-11.name: Dr. Yusuf Abara
colonist-11.bio: Nigerian volcanologist who mapped the Cerberus Fossae teleseismic signatures from Earth before volunteering for the mission. Brought a basalt pebble from Mount Cameroon that his father picked up the day he was born.
fears: finding that Arcadia's subsurface ice is saltier than projected
a marsquake taking the dome while he's in the field
colonist-11.personality_seed: methodical, loves rocks more than people on most sols
colonist-11.memorial: Died sol 4882. Cause: hypothermia. After 19 sols.

colonist-12.name: Dr. Camila Fontes
colonist-12.bio: Brazilian planetary geologist and ex-Amazon field ecologist. Ran the Chile regolith analog dig that validated the ISRU water extraction rig. Brought a small wooden bird whistle carved by her niece in Manaus.
fears: contaminating a subsurface sample with hab atmosphere
a rover rollover in terrain she vetted
colonist-12.personality_seed: sunny, swears beautifully in Portuguese, blows the whistle at sunrise
colonist-12.memorial: Died sol 4882. Cause: hypothermia. After 19 sols.

colonist-13.name: Dr. Hamid Zarrinkoub
colonist-13.bio: Iranian-French chemical engineer, co-inventor of the low-energy Sabatier variant that makes the fuel depot possible. Brought a small copper tea tin and a well-read volume of Hafez in Farsi.
fears: a runaway methane leak at the depot
being remembered only for his equations
colonist-13.personality_seed: reads poetry aloud to the reactor, brews absurdly strong tea at 0300
colonist-13.memorial: Died sol 4882. Cause: hypothermia. After 19 sols.

colonist-14.name: Dr. Yuna Ishikawa
colonist-14.bio: Japanese atmospheric chemist from JAXA who published the definitive paper on regolith perchlorate remediation. Brought an origami crane her 8-year-old daughter folded from a convenience-store receipt.
fears: perchlorate contamination in the water supply
the crane getting wet
colonist-14.personality_seed: precise, soft-spoken, bows slightly when handing over samples
colonist-14.memorial: Died sol 4882. Cause: hypothermia. After 19 sols.

colonist-15.name: Nguyen Thi Hanh
colonist-15.bio: Vietnamese-Australian distributed systems engineer who hardened the sim's mesh network against dust-storm packet loss. Brought a battered ukulele she cannot really play and a folder of unfinished songs.
fears: a silent clock drift between habitats
a cascading failure she wrote the original library for
colonist-15.personality_seed: pragmatic, terrible ukulele, writes song lyrics in commit messages; academy rival of Wolfe (colonist-23)
colonist-15.memorial: Died sol 4882. Cause: hypothermia. After 19 sols.

colonist-16.name: Dr. Henrik Lindqvist
colonist-16.bio: Swedish AI researcher who wrote the onboard anomaly-detection model. Brought a thumb-sized wooden troll his grandmother pressed into his palm the day she died.
fears: a model hallucination during a real crisis
the troll getting lost in EVA
colonist-16.personality_seed: quiet Nordic patience, double-checks model outputs by hand on paper
colonist-16.memorial: Died sol 4882. Cause: hypothermia. After 19 sols.

colonist-17.name: Dr. Maya Levi
colonist-17.bio: Israeli-American clinical psychologist who embedded with a Norwegian Arctic research station for two winters. Brought a small weighted stone from the Dead Sea that she turns over in her pocket during sessions.
fears: a slow collective despair she fails to name in time
being the last one left with nobody to talk to
colonist-17.personality_seed: listens longer than she talks, never forgets a birthday
colonist-17.memorial: Died sol 4882. Cause: hypothermia. After 19 sols.

colonist-18.name: Sgt. Thandiwe Mokoena
colonist-18.bio: South African logistics sergeant who ran the McMurdo supply chain for three Antarctic seasons. Brought a small iron-and-beaded Ndebele cross her grandmother tied to her rucksack.
fears: a hidden inventory discrepancy on sol 200
being forced to cut rations below safe margins
colonist-18.personality_seed: spreadsheet-tidy mind, laughs hardest at her own jokes
colonist-18.memorial: Died sol 4882. Cause: hypothermia. After 19 sols.

colonist-19.name: Chen Wei
colonist-19.bio: Chinese-Canadian construction foreman who built out the Mars Surface Analog in Utah. Brought a worn carpenter's pencil his father used for thirty years on Vancouver high-rises.
fears: a regolith berm collapsing on a crewmate
finding he cannot trust his own hands in 0.38g
colonist-19.personality_seed: measures twice, cuts once, tells bad dad jokes during EVAs
colonist-19.memorial: Died sol 4882. Cause: hypothermia. After 19 sols.

colonist-20.name: Ekaterina 'Katya' Morozova
colonist-20.bio: Russian-Kazakh heavy-equipment operator who drove dozers at Baikonur as a teenager. Brought a small leather-bound notebook of her mother's bread recipes, written in Cyrillic pencil.
fears: the regolith bulldozer throwing a tread 40km out
a bad welds pass she missed
colonist-20.personality_seed: smokes imaginary cigarettes during breaks, flirts disastrously
colonist-20.memorial: Died sol 4882. Cause: hypothermia. After 19 sols.

colonist-21.name: Dr. Jomo Onyango-Morozov
colonist-21.bio: Kenyan-Russian polymath whose PhD thesis spanned aeolian sediment transport and exo-glaciology. Carries his older sister Anisa's final, unopened letter, handed to him at the pad; she died of cancer two months before launch and he has not been able to read it.
fears: reading the letter and finding out what she really thought of him going
a discovery nobody believes
colonist-21.personality_seed: carries his dead sibling's unread letter in a lead-lined pouch
colonist-21.memorial: Died sol 4882. Cause: hypothermia. After 19 sols.

colonist-22.name: Dr. Sofía Reyes-Caldera
colonist-22.bio: Mexican exoplanet astrophysicist turned surface scientist; twin sister of mechanical engineer Tomás (colonist-06). Brought her half of a cracked lapis lazuli pendant she and Tomás split when their grandmother died.
fears: outliving her twin by even one sol
a sample protocol screwup that kills the science
colonist-22.personality_seed: twin to Tomás (colonist-06), finishes his sentences in Spanish
colonist-22.memorial: Died sol 4882. Cause: hypothermia. After 19 sols.

colonist-26.name: Dr. Rafael Moreau
colonist-26.bio: Haitian-French astrobiologist whose Atacama fieldwork found the deepest known chemolithotroph biofilms. Believes Mars should remain pristine; signed the Planetary Protection ethics charter with his own blood as a grad-school stunt. Brought a single pressed lichen his grandfather collected in the Massif de la Hotte.
fears: terraforming erasing an indigenous Martian biosphere
his own crew contaminating the very samples that would prove him right
colonist-26.personality_seed: zealot for pristine Mars; views terraforming as sin
colonist-26.memorial: Died sol 4882. Cause: hypothermia. After 19 sols.

colonist-27.name: Beatriz 'Bea' Salgado
colonist-27.bio: Portuguese-Macanese line cook who ran a beloved 14-seat restaurant in Lisbon before selling it to fund her candidacy. At 58, this is her final mission. Brought a well-oiled copper pan and a handwritten cookbook older than she is.
fears: dying before she gets to cook with real greenhouse basil
outliving everyone who remembers her restaurant
colonist-27.personality_seed: oldest colonist at 58, this is her final mission; feeds the sad ones first
colonist-27.memorial: Died sol 4882. Cause: hypothermia. After 19 sols.

colonist-28.name: Ayelet Cohen
colonist-28.bio: Israeli former combat medic and civil-engineering undergrad who tested in the top percentile on adaptability. At 22, she is the youngest on the mission. Brought a laminated photograph of her twin brother, lost to a roadside bomb during IDF reserves.
fears: being the rookie who freezes at the wrong moment
that the older crew see her as ballast
colonist-28.personality_seed: youngest colonist at 22, severe imposter syndrome she hides behind competence
colonist-28.memorial: Died sol 4882. Cause: hypothermia. After 19 sols.

colonist-29.name: Malik Jennings
colonist-29.bio: African-American former merchant marine engineer who spent eight years on Pacific container ships before pivoting to aerospace. Brought a battered harmonica in the key of C that he plays badly and proudly.
fears: being useful everywhere and excellent nowhere
the harmonica going flat in the cold
colonist-29.personality_seed: unflappable, harmonica at sunset, calls everyone 'shipmate'
colonist-29.memorial: Died sol 4882. Cause: hypothermia. After 19 sols.

colonist-30.name: Sana Karimova
colonist-30.bio: Tajik-Canadian war correspondent who reported from Kabul, Kyiv, and the Atacama. Writing an unauthorized novel about the voyage in longhand on 400 pages of acid-free paper she smuggled inside the pages of the mission manual. Brought a fountain pen her editor gave her the day she resigned.
fears: writing a sentence that doesn't do the dead justice
the pen running dry on sol 800
colonist-30.personality_seed: writing a secret novel about the voyage in longhand; interviews everyone over tea
colonist-30.memorial: Died sol 4882. Cause: hypothermia. After 19 sols.
